---
title: "11 Consensus Clustering Analysis"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Global rendering configuration for the whole project
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.dpi = 300,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```

# Package Loading
library(tidyverse)
library(ConsensusClusterPlus)

# Global Parameters
max_k <- 9

# Data Import
# Import core gene expression matrix

# Data Analysis
# 1. Consensus clustering computation
# 2. Optimal k-value determination via silhouette coefficient
# 3. Immune and pathway difference analysis among subtypes

# Visualization
# Clustering heatmap, consensus curve, subtype difference plot

# Result Export
# Output sample typing results and subtype differential statistics

# Result Description
# Explain optimal typing basis and disease heterogeneity
